arts.ttl: Real Sociedad vs Barcelona LIVE: Possible lineups and latest news
arts.sum: With just four points from six matches at Anoeta, Real Sociedad have the worst home record in the league. Good evening everybody and welcome along to another MARCA in English live blog, this time taking you through the LaLiga EA Sports clash between Real Sociedad and Barcelona from the Reale Arena.
